title: SV: function argument type check weak?

features.name: function argument queue type mismatch not detected
features.description: Code should include a function call where a queue argument with mismatched element bit-width is passed to a function expecting a different queue type

features.name: typedef bit unsigned with parameter width
features.description: Code should include a typedef using a preprocessor parameter to define a bit width for an unsigned type

features.name: queue with smaller bit-width passed to function expecting wider queue type
features.description: Code should include a queue declaration with fewer bits than the function parameter type expects, passed to that function without error detection
